title: 第1節　紙の匂いと棚の軋み
prompt: Create one cinematic 16:9 scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第2章　白い川風 / 第2話　古本街の影. Shared talk background: 第2章第2話の古本街背景. Background reference prompt: Cinematic early-afternoon old-book arcade near the White Heron River district. Show a narrow but welcoming covered lane with old wooden shopfronts, deep shade, paper textures, stacked books visible through windows, soft reflected daylight, and an atmosphere of quiet concentration. It should feel calm, cultured, slightly hidden, and perfect for losing track of time. Preserve the same place, architecture, time of day, weather, lighting, and atmosphere unless the scene text explicitly changes them. Use the same talk-level setting as the public-facing stage that Sato naturally notices first. Scene focus: 第1節　紙の匂いと棚の軋み / サトーパート. Summary: 食後に少し歩くと、春の明るさはゆっくりと影へ変わっていった。古本街のアーケードに入ると、空気は一段だけひんやりして、紙と木の匂いが落ち着いた層を作っている。サトーはこういう場所… Key beats: 食後に少し歩くと、春の明るさはゆっくりと影へ変わっていった。古本街のアーケードに入ると、空気は一段だけひんやりして、紙と木の匂いが落ち着いた層を作っている。サトーはこういう場所へ来ると、急に時間の進み方が遅くなるのを感じた。 店ごとに棚の癖が違うのも楽しい。入口近くに文庫本を並べる店、奥に全集を積む店、手書きの小さな仕切りだけで世界を作っている店。サトーは背表紙を追いながら、買うかどうか決める前の時間を味わう。休日は、選びかけの時間がいちばん贅沢なのかもしれなかった。 通路の奥で、本棚が一度だけ小さく軋んだ。古い建て付けの店なら珍しくもない音だが、そのすぐあとに搬入口の扉が半端に開いているのが目に入る。風かな、とサトーは思い、次の瞬間には、古い紙は湿気でいろいろ鳴るからなと勝手に話を終わらせていた。 「古い店は少しくらい鳴るものだ。静かな店ほど、こういう音も味になる」 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-episode: サトー. Keep him consistent with the episode-specific portrait generated from the canonical Sato image. Compose for a 1920x1080 delivery, keep main subjects near the center, and preserve enough left/right safe margin so the image still reads well in portrait scrolling mode. Use the installment-specific Sato portrait for Sato. Use Sera's canonical portrait directly without redesigning her for this installment. For Sato-side images, Sato is dominant and any Sera presence must stay clearly separate and unreadable as a casual companion. For Sera-side images, Sera is dominant, the attacker must not resemble Sato, and Sato must remain an unaware background figure looking elsewhere. Preserve the feeling of a refined but ordinary Sunday, and compose for a 1920x1080 delivery with the main subjects near the center and safe margins on both sides so the image also works in portrait scrolling layouts.
responseTexts: I will verify the generated image. The image successfully corrects the character's posture, with Sato now looking toward the shelves in a way that aligns with the context of browsing books. The consistency with the input character's features and outfit is excellent, and the background remains consistent as well. The composition and lighting fit the cinematic style requested. Since the previous issues regarding character engagement have been resolved and the overall quality is high, I will send this image to the user.
